disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: American who was on the hantavirus cruise ship says isolation center is like ‘prison’ - NBC News
updates.body_en: American who was on the hantavirus cruise ship says isolation center is like ‘prison’ NBC News American Passenger Blocked From Leaving Federal Hantavirus Quarantine The New York Times American passenger on hantavirus-hit cruise feels ‘blindsided’ and ‘misled’ by new quarantine orders CNN
updates.summary_zh: 美国汉坦病毒邮轮乘客称隔离中心像监狱。

updates.body_en: UK Begins Study on Andes Hantavirus with Outbreak Protocol Mirage News

updates.title_en: Hantavirus, ebola outbreaks proof world isn’t yet prepared to protect all 8 bn people: WHO’s Helen Clark - Firstpost
updates.body_en: Hantavirus, ebola outbreaks proof world isn’t yet prepared to protect all 8 bn people: WHO’s Helen Clark Firstpost
updates.summary_zh: WHO 的 Helen Clark 称汉坦病毒和埃博拉暴发证明世界尚未准备好保护80亿人。

updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 主任下令两名美国人因汉坦病毒隔离。

updates.body_en: Americans exposed to Hantavirus upset about being forced to quarantine in Nebraska NBC News
updates.summary_zh: 接触汉坦病毒的美国人对被强制在内布拉斯加州隔离表示不满。
